_comment: stock_fund_flow 量化选股项目 — quality-gate 配置
_note_build: Python 全项目语法检查，跳过 .venv / .claude / __pycache__
_note_test: pytest 可用且有测试文件时才运行，否则正常跳过
build: bash -c 'py=$(ls .venv/bin/python3 .venv/bin/python 2>/dev/null || which python3 || which python); $py -m compileall -q -x "\\.venv" -x "\\.claude" -x "__pycache__" .'
test: bash -c 'py=$(ls .venv/bin/python3 .venv/bin/python 2>/dev/null || which python3 || which python); if ! $py -m pytest --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "pytest not installed — skip" && exit 0; fi; tests=$(find . -path ./.venv -prune -o \( -name "test_*.py" -o -name "*_test.py" \) -print 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$tests" ]; then $py -m pytest -q; else echo "no test files — skip" && exit 0; fi'
